import{useState}from'react';import{useAuth}from'../../hooks/useAuth';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export function SignInForm(){const{signIn}=useAuth();const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(null);const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setLoading(true);setError(null);try{await signIn(email,password);// No need to handle success - AuthContext will update automatically
